tags.name: `mc-segmented-control`
tags.description:
Purpose: A segmented control to switch between different views or content sections.
Category: Navigation, Content Display, Data Display
When to use: When you need to present multiple related options in a compact space.
When not to use: For unrelated options or when space is not a concern.
Works with components: mc-segmented-control-item, mc-card, mc-modal
Alternative component names: Segmented Button Group, Tabbed Navigation

Events:

  * `listchange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a segmented control item is interacted.

  * `listitemsloaded` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the segmented control items are loaded.

  * `focuschange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a segmented control item receives focus.

  * `scroll` {`Event`} - Dispatched when the segmented control group is scrolled.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the segmented control items go.

Properties:

  * `isDragging` {`boolean`} - 

  * `startPos` {`number`} - 

  * `startScrollPos` {`number`} - 

  * `handleDragStart` - 

  * `handleDragMove` - 

  * `handleDragEnd` - 

  * `type` {`string`} - 

  * `width` {`string`} - 

  * `disablecircularkeynav` {`boolean`} - 

  * `keynavigationtype` {`string`} - 

  * `disablehandlemousemove` {`boolean`} - 

  * `scrollToSelectedValue` {`boolean`} - 

  * `scrollSelectedIntoView` {`boolean`} - 

  * `orientation` {`string`} -

attributes.name: onlistchange
attributes.description: `listchange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a segmented control item is interacted.

attributes.name: onlistitemsloaded
attributes.description: `listitemsloaded` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the segmented control items are loaded.

attributes.name: onfocuschange
attributes.description: `focuschange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a segmented control item receives focus.

attributes.name: onscroll
attributes.description: `scroll` {`Event`} - Dispatched when the segmented control group is scrolled.
